name: Euler's Totient Function
description: Compute φ(n) — the count of integers from 1 to n that are coprime with n.
intuition: Factorize n into its prime factors. Apply the formula φ(n) = n × ∏(1 - 1/p) for each distinct prime factor p. Each prime factor p reduces the count by a factor of (p-1)/p.
